query_title: Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs

recommendations.title: Fantasia
recommendations.overview: Walt Disney's timeless masterpiece is an extravaganza of sight and sound! See the music come to life, hear the pictures burst into song and experience the excitement that is Fantasia over and over again.
recommendations.director: Jim Handley, James Algar, Norman Ferguson, Bill Roberts, Ben Sharpsteen, David Hand, Paul Satterfield, Wilfred Jackson, Ford Beebe Jr., Hamilton Luske, T. Hee, Samuel Armstrong

recommendations.title: Bambi
recommendations.overview: Bambi's tale unfolds from season to season as the young prince of the forest learns about life, love, and friends.

recommendations.title: Santa's Workshop
recommendations.overview: Santa's little helpers must hurry to finish the toys before Christmas Day.

recommendations.title: Dumbo
recommendations.overview: Dumbo is a baby elephant born with over-sized ears and a supreme lack of confidence. But thanks to his even more diminutive buddy Timothy the Mouse,  the pint-sized pachyderm learns to surmount all obstacles.
recommendations.director: Jack Kinney, Norman Ferguson, Bill Roberts, Wilfred Jackson, Samuel Armstrong, Ben Sharpsteen

recommendations.title: Pinocchio
recommendations.overview: When the gentle woodcarver Geppetto builds a marionette to be his substitute son, a benevolent fairy brings the toy to life. The puppet, named Pinocchio, is not yet a human boy. He must earn the right to be real by proving that he is brave, truthful,
recommendations.director: Norman Ferguson, Wilfred Jackson, Bill Roberts, Jack Kinney, T. Hee, Ben Sharpsteen, Hamilton Luske

recommendations.title: Thru the Mirror
recommendations.overview: Mickey has been reading Alice in Wonderland, and falls asleep. He finds himself on the other side of the mirror, where the furniture is alive.

recommendations.title: The Grasshopper and the Ants
recommendations.overview: As in the classic fable, the grasshopper plays his fiddle and lives for the moment, while the industrious ants squirrel away massive amounts of food for the winter. With his song, he's able to convince at least one small ant until the queen arrives a

recommendations.title: Alice in Wonderland
recommendations.overview: On a golden afternoon, wildly curious young Alice tumbles into the burrow and enters the merry, madcap world of Wonderland full of whimsical escapades.
recommendations.director: Clyde Geronimi, Hamilton Luske, Wilfred Jackson

recommendations.title: Song of the South
recommendations.overview: Uncle Remus draws upon his tales of Br'er Rabbit to help little Johnny deal with his confusion over his parents' separation as well as his new life on the plantation.

recommendations.title: Snow White and the Huntsman
